mapper.sql: t.id, t.job_id, t.glue_type, t.glue_source, t.glue_remark, t.add_time, t.update_time
mapper.insert:
select from dual
INSERT INTO xxl_job_logglue ( id, job_id, glue_type, glue_source, glue_remark, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{jobId}, #{glueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{glueSource,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{glueRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM xxl_job_logglue t WHERE t.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY id DESC
